---
name: Documentation
about: Suggest an improvement or report a problem with documentation
title: "[DOCS]"
labels: documentation, needs-triage
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the documentation issue.

## Current Documentation

Link to or quote the current documentation:

## Problem

What is unclear, missing, or incorrect about the current documentation?

## Suggested Improvement

How should the documentation be improved?

## Additional Context

Any other context or links that might be helpful.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues and discussions
- [ ] The documentation could be clearer
- [ ] I have a specific suggestion for improvement
